name: Chuo Build Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Chuo Build Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the production, sale, and rental of temporary equipment for civil engineering and construction industry in China. It offers framework scaffoldings, single pipe scaffolds and parts, rolling towers, aluminum sky guards, suspension scaffoldings, steel scaffolding boards, etc.; and mobile indoor scaffoldings, shuttering systems, construction scaffold frames, Al Column, Al props, beam brackets, building frames, steel stepladders and cart horse products, aluminum load receiving beams, hanging scaffoldings, stairs/handrails, and wedge tightening scaffolds. The company also provides steel clamps/stanions, flying shore systems, corner guards, jack support products, nursing frames/ vertical dumplings, DS hanger stages, fall prevention products, multi truss products, single tubes/clamps, Karaman chains/chain clamps, and wall ties/floor plates. In addition, it processes and sells residential steel products. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
